summary: End-to-end UI testing of TokenForge SPA via preview URL. All 13 requested flows pass: landing renders (hero/counters/calculator/pillars/infra/waitlist/pricing-teaser/footer), live calculator round-trip via /api/optimize works with metrics, waitlist toasts both states ('You're on the list' + 'already on the waitlist'), register→/dashboard, login/logout round-trip, KPI grid + Recharts panel, API key list/create/copy/reveal/revoke (with window.confirm accept), Playground signed-in and signed-out both functional, Docs tabs (curl/python/js) + copy, Pricing 4 cards visible + Pro Upgrade returns Stripe checkout 200 and navigates to checkout.stripe.com, Billing current-plan card + all 3 upgrade buttons present, /admin redirect-to-/dashboard for non-admin enforced, Admin login shows admin-kpis + admin-waitlist-table, DashboardNav shows user-email + plan badge.

issues: Sonner toast appears top-right and can briefly overlap the 'Sign out' button + plan badge. Cosmetic only — toast auto-dismisses, no functional block.

critical_code_review_comments: Pricing.jsx hard-codes a synthetic 'free' tier on top of backend /billing/plans response — acceptable but couples FE to BE plan list shape; consider returning 'free' from the backend for a single source of truth.

Keys.jsx revoke() relies on window.confirm — works but not accessible/testable without dialog handler; consider a shadcn AlertDialog with a data-testid on the confirm button for better UX + Playwright friendliness.
Billing.jsx fetches /billing/plans without a loading/error state; if request fails, the upgrade grid is silently empty.
Admin protection is client-side only (redirect on user.role !== 'admin'). Backend already enforces 403 on admin endpoints (verified iter-1), so this is acceptable, but worth a comment in code.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@tokenforge.io / ForgeAdmin!2026. Fresh test users created dynamically: qa_<ts>@tokenforge.io / qaforge123.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 fresh QA users, 1 waitlist entry (qa_wl_<ts>@tokenforge.io), 2 API keys (one revoked), 1 Stripe test-mode checkout session (cs_test_...) via Pro upgrade click. No production data modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preview URL = https://market-launch-43.preview.emergentagent.com (from /app/frontend/.env). All data-testid attributes are present on interactive elements. Stripe is in test mode and the Pro CTA correctly navigates to checkout.stripe.com — DO NOT complete payment. /api/billing/plans does NOT include 'free' tier; FE synthesizes it. Revoke flow uses window.confirm() — Playwright must register page.on('dialog', d=>d.accept()) before clicking. Toaster (sonner) sits top-right and can briefly overlay the Sign-out button in screenshots, not a functional issue. Fonts load correctly (Cabinet Grotesk + IBM Plex Sans/Mono). Brand color is rgb(255,69,0) as required.
